name: Axis MY Zone Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹50,000 in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 1 EDGE Point per ₹200 spent on all purchases
5X EDGE Points (5 per ₹200) on dining and entertainment spends

additionalBenefits: 5X rewards on dining and entertainment - great for foodies
Easy annual fee waiver with ₹50,000 spend
Axis Bank Dining Delights programme with restaurant discounts
pros: 5X rewards on dining and entertainment is among the best in entry-tier
Reasonable annual fee of ₹500 with easy waiver at ₹50K spend
Good card for people who eat out frequently
Axis Dining Delights adds extra restaurant discounts
Fuel surcharge waiver on petrol pump transactions
cons: Low base earn rate of 1 point per ₹200 outside dining/entertainment
EDGE Point value is only ₹0.40 per point
Limited accelerated categories beyond dining and entertainment
idealFor: Frequent diners and people who spend heavily on food delivery and restaurants
Entertainment enthusiasts who spend on movies, OTT platforms, and events
Entry-level cardholders looking for strong category-specific rewards

faqs.question: What counts as dining and entertainment for 5X rewards?
faqs.answer: Transactions at restaurants, cafes, food delivery apps (Swiggy, Zomato), movie theatres, OTT subscriptions, and entertainment venues typically qualify for the 5X EDGE Points multiplier.

faqs.question: How can I waive the annual fee on the Axis MY Zone card?
faqs.answer: Spend ₹50,000 or more in the previous year and the ₹500 annual fee is waived for the next year.

faqs.question: Does this card offer lounge access?
faqs.answer: No, the Axis MY Zone Credit Card does not include any complimentary lounge access.

faqs.question: Can I use this card for online food ordering and get 5X points?
faqs.answer: Yes, orders on Swiggy, Zomato, and similar food delivery platforms are classified under dining and earn 5X EDGE Points.
